name: Chocolate Zucchini Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F (165°C).
2. Butter and flour a 13 x 9 x 2 inch baking pan.
3. Sift together the flour, cocoa powder, baking soda, and salt in a medium bowl.
4. In a large bowl, beat the sugar with butter and oil until well blended.
5. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Stir in vanilla extract.
6. Alternately add dry ingredients and buttermilk in three additions each.
7. Mix in grated zucchini.
8. Pour batter into prepared pan. Sprinkle chocolate chips and nuts over the top.
9. Bake for 50 minutes or until a tester comes out clean. Allow cake to cool completely in the pan before serving.
